statement: In every magma, Equation 1565 (`x = (y * z) * (x * (w * y))`) implies Equation 4192 (`x * y = ((z * x) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0809
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op x (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z x) x) y)
